description: AgentLedger Capability Ontology v0.1 — 65 capability tags across 5 root domains

tags.label: Search flights
tags.description: Search for available flights by route, date, and passenger count

tags.label: Book a flight
tags.description: Complete a flight booking including seat selection and payment

tags.label: Cancel a flight
tags.description: Cancel an existing flight reservation and process refund

tags.label: Search ground transport
tags.description: Search for car rentals, rideshares, trains, or bus routes

tags.label: Book ground transport
tags.description: Reserve a car rental, rideshare, train, or bus ticket

tags.label: Track ground transport
tags.description: Track real-time status and location of booked ground transport

tags.label: Search lodging
tags.description: Search for hotels, vacation rentals, and other accommodations

tags.label: Book lodging
tags.description: Reserve a hotel room or vacation rental with payment

tags.label: Cancel lodging
tags.description: Cancel a lodging reservation and process refund per policy

tags.label: Apply for travel document
tags.description: Submit applications for visas, travel permits, or transit passes

tags.label: Verify travel document
tags.description: Validate passport, visa, or travel permit status and eligibility

tags.label: Retrieve travel document
tags.description: Fetch copies of issued travel documents or boarding passes

tags.label: Build travel itinerary
tags.description: Compose a multi-segment travel itinerary across transport and lodging

tags.label: Send a payment
tags.description: Execute a payment or money transfer to a recipient

tags.label: Request a payment
tags.description: Generate a payment request or invoice for a specified amount

tags.label: Verify a payment
tags.description: Confirm payment status, receipt, or settlement details

tags.label: Check account balance
tags.description: Retrieve current balance and available funds for an account

tags.label: View transaction history
tags.description: Retrieve historical transactions for a financial account

tags.label: Open an account
tags.description: Initiate the opening of a new financial account or wallet

tags.label: Get investment quote
tags.description: Retrieve current price quotes for stocks, bonds, or crypto assets

tags.label: Execute a trade
tags.description: Place a buy or sell order for a financial instrument

tags.label: View portfolio
tags.description: Retrieve current holdings, allocation, and performance metrics

tags.label: Get insurance quote
tags.description: Request a premium quote for an insurance policy

tags.label: File insurance claim
tags.description: Submit an insurance claim with supporting documentation

tags.label: Check claim status
tags.description: Retrieve the current status of a filed insurance claim

tags.label: Enroll in insurance plan
tags.description: Enroll in or purchase a new insurance policy

tags.label: Search appointments
tags.description: Search for available healthcare appointment slots by provider or specialty

tags.label: Book appointment
tags.description: Schedule a healthcare appointment with a specific provider

tags.label: Cancel appointment
tags.description: Cancel an existing healthcare appointment

tags.label: Retrieve medical records
tags.description: Fetch patient medical records, lab results, or imaging reports

tags.label: Share medical records
tags.description: Share medical records with another provider or authorized party

tags.label: Update medical records
tags.description: Submit updates or corrections to existing medical records

tags.label: Search pharmacies
tags.description: Find pharmacies by location, medication availability, or insurance acceptance

tags.label: Order prescription
tags.description: Submit a prescription order for fulfillment or delivery

tags.label: Refill prescription
tags.description: Request a refill of an existing prescription

tags.label: Read health metrics
tags.description: Retrieve health monitoring data from wearables or connected devices

tags.label: Set health alert
tags.description: Configure alerts for health metric thresholds or anomalies

tags.label: Generate health report
tags.description: Generate summary reports from longitudinal health monitoring data

tags.label: Connect health device
tags.description: Register and connect a health monitoring device or wearable

tags.label: Search products
tags.description: Search for products by category, brand, price, or features

tags.label: Purchase product
tags.description: Complete a product purchase including payment and shipping

tags.label: Return product
tags.description: Initiate a product return and process refund

tags.label: Compare products
tags.description: Compare features, prices, and reviews across multiple products

tags.label: Start subscription
tags.description: Subscribe to a recurring service or product delivery

tags.label: Cancel subscription
tags.description: Cancel an active subscription and stop recurring charges

tags.label: Manage subscription
tags.description: Update subscription preferences, tier, or payment method

tags.label: Track delivery
tags.description: Track shipment status and estimated delivery time

tags.label: Schedule delivery
tags.description: Choose or change a delivery date, time window, or address

tags.label: Reroute delivery
tags.description: Redirect an in-transit shipment to a different address

tags.label: Read reviews
tags.description: Retrieve product or service reviews and aggregate ratings

tags.label: Write review
tags.description: Submit a product or service review with rating and text

tags.label: Verify purchase for review
tags.description: Confirm purchase eligibility before allowing a review submission

tags.label: List calendar events
tags.description: Retrieve upcoming events and availability from a calendar

tags.label: Create calendar event
tags.description: Schedule a new event or meeting on a calendar

tags.label: Modify calendar event
tags.description: Reschedule, update, or cancel an existing calendar event

tags.label: Send message
tags.description: Send an email, chat message, or notification to recipients

tags.label: Read messages
tags.description: Retrieve and read incoming emails, chats, or notifications

tags.label: Summarize communications
tags.description: Generate summaries of email threads, chat histories, or meeting notes

tags.label: Create document
tags.description: Create a new document, spreadsheet, or presentation

tags.label: Edit document
tags.description: Modify content in an existing document or spreadsheet

tags.label: Share document
tags.description: Share a document with specified recipients and permission levels

tags.label: Sign document
tags.description: Apply a digital or electronic signature to a document

tags.label: Trigger automation
tags.description: Execute a predefined automation workflow or macro

tags.label: Schedule automation
tags.description: Schedule an automation to run at a specified time or on a trigger

tags.label: Monitor automation
tags.description: Check status, logs, and outcomes of running or completed automations
